funFacts: Formula 1 Formula 1 race cars are advanced engineering machines powered by hybrid V6 turbocharged engines producing close to 1,000 horsepower.
The aerodynamic design of a Formula 1 race car generates immense downforce, allowing it to take tight track corners at lateral forces exceeding 5 Gs.
